heading: Smithsonian Library
label: 151 Smithsonian Library
text: The library collected by the Smithsonian Institution under the provisions of the Act of , chapter 25, and removed from the building of that institution, with the consent of the Regents thereof, to the Library of Congress, shall, while there deposited, be subject to the same regulations as the Library of Congress, except as hereinafter provided.August 10, 1846
notes: References in TextAct of , chapter 25, referred to in text, probably should be , , which was entitled “An Act to establish the ‘Smithsonian Institution’, for the increase and diffusion of knowledge among men”.August 10, 1846act Aug. 10, 1846, ch. 1789 Stat. 102
CodificationR.S. § 99 derived from , .act Apr. 5, 1866, ch. 25, § 114 Stat. 13
